name: three.js
when_to_use: 需要可旋转相机、光照、材质或成组几何体来解释三维空间关系时用它,而非手写 Canvas/WebGL——原生在投影矩阵、深度排序与 GPU 资源管理上高成本且不稳;非做真地图瓦片、完整游戏或物理仿真。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能画伪 3D SVG 或一次性 canvas,做不到稳定相机投影、材质/光照、深度缓冲和逐帧渲染;three.js 把这些 0% 区收敛为 Object3D/Camera/Renderer 原生 API。

data_in._why_no_example: three.js 是 programmed native API,这里输入已实例化的 Object3D,不是另造一套深 config;schema 与 boot 足够。
data_in.note: objects 与 camera 必须由同一次 three 模块导入创建;boot 只做 Scene/Renderer 挂载,不发明 JSON 场景协议。所有可选字段均注明默认。

schema.objects: THREE.Object3D[] —— 要加入 Scene 的 Mesh/Line/Points/Group,必填
schema.camera?: THREE.Camera —— 默认 PerspectiveCamera(50, width/height, 0.1, 1000),位置 z=5
schema.background?: THREE.ColorRepresentation | null —— 默认 null（透明/由 renderer alpha 决定）

spec.note: WebGL canvas 必须拿到显式像素尺寸;默认高度 480px、宽度取容器 clientWidth,铁律 3 禁 vh/百分比高。容器变化时同步 renderer.setSize 与 camera aspect。

carriers.widget: supported:ESM CDN + WebGL canvas 可完全落 ShadowRoot;无 CSS/head/uplink 依赖
carriers.codex: supported:需宿主提供 WebGL;纯几何不依赖图片或字体 CDN

isolation.evidence: renderer.domElement(WebGL canvas)只落传入容器;无 document/window 监听(webglcontextlost 挂自身 canvas);纯几何无 CSS/字体/head 依赖

en.when_to_use: Use it when rotatable cameras, lighting, materials, or grouped geometry are needed to explain 3D spatial relationships instead of handwritten Canvas/WebGL, which is expensive and unreliable for projection matrices, depth sorting, and GPU resource management. Not for real map tiles, a complete game, or physics simulation.
en.why_valuable: AI defaults can only draw pseudo-3D SVG or one-off canvas and cannot provide stable camera projection, materials/lighting, depth buffering, and frame-by-frame rendering; three.js reduces these 0% areas to the native Object3D/Camera/Renderer API.

data_in.note: objects and camera must be created by the same three module import. boot only mounts Scene/Renderer and does not invent a JSON scene protocol. Every optional field states its default.

schema.objects: THREE.Object3D[] -- Mesh/Line/Points/Group instances to add to Scene; required
schema.camera?: THREE.Camera -- Defaults to PerspectiveCamera(50, width/height, 0.1, 1000) at z=5
schema.background?: THREE.ColorRepresentation | null -- Default null (transparent/determined by renderer alpha)

spec.note: The WebGL canvas needs explicit pixel dimensions; default height is 480px and width comes from container.clientWidth. vh and percentage heights are forbidden by rule 3. When the container changes, synchronize renderer.setSize and camera aspect.
